name: CMA CGM Ocean Shipping and Digital Solutions REST API
what_it_does: CMA CGM ocean shipping and digital solutions REST API for shippers, freight forwarders, and logistics platforms to manage container bookings, track shipments, access sailing schedules, retrieve bill of lading data, and obtain freight rate quotes — enabling automated ocean freight operations through CMA CGM's digital logistics platform with coverage across 420 ports in 160 countries, serving as the world's third-largest container shipping line. Enables AI agents to manage booking for ocean freight reservation and confirmation automation, handle container tracking for real-time shipment milestone automation, access schedule for sailing and vessel timetable automation, retrieve rate quote for freight pricing automation, manage bill of lading for shipping document management automation, handle documentation for shipping instruction submission automation, access vessel position for AIS tracking and ETA automation, retrieve port congestion for terminal operational status automation, manage carbon footprint for scope 3 shipping emissions calculation automation, and integrate CMA CGM with TMS, ERP, and supply chain visibility platforms for automated ocean freight operations.
use_cases: Tracking container shipments through CMA CGM network for supply chain visibility automation agents
Booking ocean freight and obtaining rate quotes for shipper procurement automation agents
Accessing sailing schedules and vessel information for logistics planning automation agents
Calculating carbon emissions from CMA CGM shipments for Scope 3 reporting automation agents
not_for: Air freight (CMA CGM is ocean container shipping only)
Land transportation (CMA CGM focuses on ocean freight, though offers some inland through subsidiaries)
Bulk or tanker shipping (CMA CGM is container shipping, not bulk commodities)
best_when: A shipper, freight forwarder, or logistics technology company wanting AI agents to track containers, book ocean freight, access sailing schedules, and calculate shipping carbon footprints through CMA CGM's digital API across 420+ ports.
avoid_when: CMA CGM CUSTOMER ACCOUNT REQUIRED: Most booking and commercial APIs require active CMA CGM customer relationship; automated public API access assumption creates limited endpoint access for commercial features; automated must establish CMA CGM customer or technology partner relationship. TRACKING IS MILESTONE-BASED: CMA CGM tracking provides port event milestones, not continuous GPS position; automated real-time GPS assumption creates milestone-only tracking data; automated must interpret port events as tracking milestones. DOCUMENTATION CUTOFFS ARE STRICT: Shipping instruction and VGM submission deadlines are strict; automated flexible-documentation assumption creates port_cutoff_exceeded; automated must implement CMA CGM document cutoff tracking. API DEVELOPER PORTAL ACCESS: CMA CGM has a developer portal for API access; automated direct production access assumption creates developer_registration_required; automated must register on CMA CGM developer portal.

auth.notes: CMA CGM uses OAuth2 for digital shipping REST API. REST API with JSON. Marseille, France HQ. Founded 1978 by Jacques Saadé. Privately held (Saadé family). Products: Container booking, tracking, schedules, rates, documentation, carbon footprint. SDKs: None public. 420+ ports. 160+ countries. 3rd largest container shipping line. Subsidiaries: ANL, APL, CNC, MacAndrews, CEVA Logistics. Competes with Maersk and Hapag-Lloyd for container digital access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public APIs (tracking, schedules) free with registration; commercial APIs require customer account
pricing.paid_tiers: Included with commercial shipping services; no separate API fees
pricing.notes: Marseille FR. Saadé family. Free public APIs. Commercial with shipping contract. 3rd largest container line.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; tracking and schedule APIs are permissive; booking APIs throttled per account

known_agent_gotchas: CONTAINER ISO CODE REQUIRED: Container numbers follow ISO 6346 (4-letter + 7-digit); automated free-format container ID assumption creates format_validation_error; automated must validate ISO 6346 container number format before tracking calls

BOOKING REFERENCE VS CONTAINER: CMA CGM uses both booking reference and container number; automated single-identifier assumption creates different endpoints for booking vs. container queries; automated must understand when to use booking reference vs. container number

SAILING SCHEDULE HAS VALIDITY WINDOWS: CMA CGM sailing schedules are published for specific validity periods; automated perpetual schedule assumption creates expired_schedule for queries beyond validity window; automated must specify date range within published schedule window

CARBON FOOTPRINT USES GLEC FRAMEWORK: CMA CGM carbon calculations follow GLEC (Global Logistics Emissions Council) methodology; automated custom emissions assumption creates methodology_mismatch; automated must use CMA CGM's GLEC-based emissions data for Scope 3 reporting

SUBSIDIARY BRANDS ARE SEPARATE: ANL, APL, and CNC are separate CMA CGM brands with different bookings; automated single-CMA-CGM assumption creates brand-specific routing for subsidiary shipments; automated must route to correct brand API for subsidiary carrier bookings
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ocean shipping. GDPR, IMO DCS. OAuth2. FR/EU. Cargo, BL, and container tracking data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ocean freight. GDPR, IMO. OAuth2. FR/EU. Container and shipping document data.
